summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of FitoutOS Phase 2 features including Programme Upload → Edit → Confirm workflow, Risk Analysis, Task Management, Critical Path calculation, and full UI integration. All core functionality is working excellently with significant improvements from previous iteration.

minor_issues.issue: Specific test job ID 9870de29-b2c3-46dd-9c2e-39a464cd8862 not found (404)
minor_issues.impact: Expected failure - test job may have been removed

minor_issues.issue: No master task codes pre-populated in system
minor_issues.impact: Affects timesheet functionality but core features work

design_issues.issue: Shows 'No daily timeline yet' message when no quoted hours are set
Some 404 console errors but page still loads and functions correctly

passed_tests: Backend job CRUD operations - 20/21 tests passing (95.2%)
Backend task CRUD operations with risk warning fields
Backend Programme bulk-save and generate-tasks APIs
Backend Risk Analysis API with blocked_count, at_risk_count, checklist_incomplete_count
Backend Critical Path calculation with is_critical field
Frontend login authentication flow - FIXED from previous iteration
Frontend dashboard with correct counts (5 Active Jobs, 14 Tasks Starting Soon, 3 Blocked Tasks)
Frontend jobs page with 5 job cards displayed correctly
Frontend job detail page with all tabs (Tasks, Programme, Delays, Task Codes)
Frontend programme tab with visual timeline/Gantt display
Frontend tasks tab with status badges (Critical, Internal/Subcontractor)
Frontend task creation dialog with all fields working
